breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. military conducts strikes against Iran
breaking.summary: U.S. says it struck Iran targets after attack on cargo ship

breaking.title: U.S. strikes Iran to respond to attack on ship that Trump says violated ceasefire
breaking.summary: U.S. Central Command said the military struck missile and drone locations and coastal radar sites in Iran

breaking.title: UN agency working to restart Hormuz evacuations after ship attack
breaking.summary: Some ‌115 vessels and around 2,500 seafarers were able to sail through ‌the ⁠strait before evacuations were paused, IMO Secretary-General Arsenio Dominguez ⁠told a virtual news conference

breaking.title: US Forces Strike Iranian Drone, Missile Sites After Attack On Cargo Ship
breaking.summary: US said the strikes were a response to "unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iran.

breaking.title: Indian-origin man Kishore Gujarati shot and injured in Portugal, probe underway
breaking.summary: In an alarming incident, Kishore Gujarati, an individual of Indian descent, sustained injuries from a shooting in Odivelas, Portugal, prompting a thorough investigation by local police. Amidst this, unverified social media accounts have claimed responsibility. Additionally, Irish authorities have reported multiple attacks on Indian residents, leading to some arrests. The investigation into the Odivelas shooting is ongoing, with police exploring various motives.

breaking.title: "Charlie’s bloody coat was returned to Erika": Candace Owens releases unseen SUV photos after Charlie Kirk's assassination, raises new questions
breaking.summary: Candace Owens has released previously unseen photos from the SUV that transported Charlie Kirk to the hospital after he was fatally shot, claiming they raise new questions about the events following the attack. She pointed to shattered glass, a blood-stained bag, and Kirk's damaged microphone, while questioning how evidence was handled. Owens also highlighted alleged inconsistencies in witness accounts. However, her claims remain her interpretation and have not been officially verified by investigators.

breaking.title: Venezuela earthquake: People take search for the missing into their own hands as death toll nears 1,000
breaking.summary: Citizens digging through the rubble of their homes said they have seen few state rescue teams in the areas hit hardest by the devastating 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude quakes

breaking.title: Iran Says It Targeted US Positions In The Region In Response To Attack
breaking.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Saturday said it targeted US military positions in the region, in response to a fresh U.S. strike against Iran.
